name: pdf-to-markdown
description: Convert PDFs to Markdown with Marker for Codex context.

interface.shortDescription: Convert PDFs to Markdown for Codex context.
interface.longDescription: Adds a repeatable Marker-based PDF to Markdown workflow with LLM cleanup, Gemini Flash-Lite defaults, and image descriptions instead of extracted image files.
defaultPrompt: Turn this repo PDF into context Markdown.
Extract this PDF as Markdown next to the file.
